steps.title: Make the description subordinate
steps.content: The main sentence needs to say that the documentary was directed by Neta Rhyne. The detail about what it is about should be placed in a nonrestrictive which-clause.

steps.title: Reject broken clauses
steps.content: Choice A leaves is about and was directed competing awkwardly in one clause. Choice B lacks the comma needed for a nonrestrictive clause. Choice C capitalizes documentary mid-sentence and fails to supply which.

steps.title: Choose the which-clause
steps.content: Documentary, which creates a properly set-off nonrestrictive clause before the main verb was directed. The answer is D.
